name: MemPlace Memory Provider
description: Bridges MemPlace (Memory Palace) MCP server into OpenClaw's memory and tool systems. Provides semantic search, diary capture and auto-recall across agent sessions.
author: OpenClaw Integration Layer

configSchema.title: MemPlacePluginConfig
configSchema.description: Configuration for the MemPlace MCP client plugin.

mcpPath.description: Absolute path to the mempalace MCP server executable (e.g. /usr/local/bin/mempalace). Must be executable.

autoRecall.description: When true, the plugin automatically searches MemPlace for relevant memories before each agent turn (context:pre-turn hook).

autoCapture.description: When true, the plugin flushes the conversation transcript to the MemPlace diary before each context compaction (context:pre-compact hook).

topKDefault.description: Default number of memory results to fetch in auto-recall mode.

connectionTimeoutMs.description: Milliseconds to wait for the MCP server process to become ready before failing.
